title: Stepless Photo Metadata
description: Metadata schema for accessibility photos stored on IPFS and referenced on Arc Testnet via the Memo contract (0x5294E9927c3306DcBaDb03fe70b92e01cCede505).

locationHash.description: Keccak-256 hash of the location and category, used as the on-chain contentHash in the Memo contract. Computed as keccak256(abi.encodePacked(latitude, longitude, category)).

latitude.description: WGS84 latitude of the accessibility feature. Rounded to 4 decimal places (~11m precision) for contributor privacy.

longitude.description: WGS84 longitude of the accessibility feature. Rounded to 4 decimal places (~11m precision) for contributor privacy.

category.description: Category of the accessibility feature photographed.

accessibilityRating.description: Contributor's accessibility rating from 1 (poor/inaccessible) to 5 (excellent/fully accessible).

description.description: Human-readable description of the accessibility feature. Can be a single string (default language: English) or a multilingual map of ISO 639-1 language codes to translated strings.

oneOf.description: Multilingual description keyed by ISO 639-1 language code.

examples.pt: Rampa de cadeira de rodas na entrada norte
examples.es: Rampa para silla de ruedas en la entrada norte

contributorAddress.description: Ethereum-compatible address of the contributor who uploaded this photo. Must match the address that called the Memo contract.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the photo was uploaded. Should match the on-chain block timestamp from the Memo contract transaction.

photoCID.description: IPFS Content Identifier (CID) of the compressed photo. CIDv1 (bafy...) preferred. This value is stored as the 'data' field in the Memo contract's memo() call.

photoThumbnailCID.description: Optional IPFS CID of a 256x256 JPEG thumbnail for fast preview loading in list views.

verificationStatus.description: Verification status of the photo. 'pending' when first uploaded, 'verified' after a verifier confirms the accessibility feature, 'rejected' if the photo is invalid or misleading.

verifierAddress.description: Ethereum-compatible address of the verifier who confirmed or rejected this photo. Required when verificationStatus is 'verified' or 'rejected'.

arweaveTxId.description: Optional Arweave transaction ID if the photo has been permanently archived on Arweave via Irys (Bundlr).

photoSize.description: Size of the compressed photo in bytes. Useful for cost analysis and display optimization.

photoDimensions.description: Dimensions of the compressed photo in pixels.

network.description: Blockchain network where the photo reference is stored.

memoTxHash.description: Transaction hash of the Memo contract call that stored this photo's CID on-chain.

description.en: Wheelchair ramp at north entrance of the municipal library
description.pt: Rampa de cadeira de rodas na entrada norte da biblioteca municipal

examples.description: Accessible restroom on the second floor near the elevators
